arts.ttl: Serie A | Torino v Lazio: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Torino prepares to host Lazio in the sixth round of Serie A, manager Paolo Vanoli is expected to stick with the 3-5-2 formation that has served the team well in their unbeaten start to the league campaign. The Granata will be looking to bounce back from their midweek Coppa Italia defeat to Empoli and maintain their impressive league form. In goal, there’s a potential change as Vanja Milinkovic-Savic may be unavailable due to injury. Alberto Paleari stands ready to deputize if needed. Milan are plotting a potential transfer for Torino’s Samuele Ricci. According to a report by Tutto Atalanta, Milan have registered a strong interest in Torino midfielder Samuele Ricci. The 23-year-old…

Lazio are unbeaten in nine of their last 10 Serie A games against Torino (W5 D4), keeping clean sheets in the two most recent ones – the only win for the Granata in that period dates to 22 April 2023 (1-0 at Biancocelesti’s home); Lazio could record three clean sheets in a row against the Granata in the tournament for the first time since 1971-73. Lazio have not lost any of their last five away games against Torino in the league (W3 D2), already a record run for the Biancocelesti against the Granata away from home in Serie A, not conceding a goal in the two most recent games.

arts.sum: Following their comfortable Europa League win over Dynamo Kyiv, Lazio are hoping to put their domestic campaign back on track when they take on the surprising Serie A leaders Torino. arts.ttl: Torino manager Vanoli focused on growth ahead of Lazio clash
arts.sum: As Torino prepare to face Lazio in their upcoming Serie A match, manager Paolo Vanoli addressed the media in a pre-match press conference. The Granata are looking to bounce back after their Coppa Italia defeat against Empoli and continue their positive momentum in the league. Vanoli began by emphasizing the importance of the match against Lazio, stating, “Torino must always be ready, we know we are facing a team that is doing very well at the moment, we saw it in the Europa League. arts.ttl: Serie A | Torino v Lazio: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Olimpico Grande Torino is set to host a captivating Serie A encounter on Sunday as league leaders Torino welcome Lazio in a match that could have significant implications for both teams’ seasons. Torino have been the revelation of the Serie A season so far, sitting atop the table after five rounds. Under new manager Paolo Vanoli, the Granata have exceeded all expectations, remaining unbeaten in the league with three wins and two draws.
